T0274.title: Bulk Unsolicited Dms
T0274.definition: The act of using automated tools to bypass platform restrictions and send bulk private messages to a large number of non-friend users.
T0274.description: Black market operators use bot farm systems or scripts to push unsolicited private messages containing ads, phishing links, or scam scripts to unauthorized users on a massive scale. This operation disregards user privacy settings and is often associated with compromised or bulk-registered virtual accounts. It is primarily used for adult content redirection, task scams, or gambling site promotion, frequently leading to financial loss for the victims.
